growth_records.cite: Crowe et al. The unusual convergence of steroid catabolic pathways in Mycobacterium abscessus. Proceedings of the National Academy of Sciences of the United States of America (2022). DOI:10.1073/pnas.2207505119. [PMC9546629]
growth_records.snippet: The strain grew to stationary phase within 72 h on cholesterol with a doubling time of ~12 h, and a concurrent depletion of cholesterol from the media was observed using gas chromatography coupled-mass spectrometry (GC-M
growth_records.notes: Doubling time of ~12 h directly reported for M. abscessus ATCC 19977 grown on 0.5 mM cholesterol as carbon source (7H9+0.5% tyloxapol, 37C with shaking in 96-well plates, per Fig. 2 legend). growth_rate_per_h = ln(2)/12 = 0.0578 h-1 (calculated).
